name: Changzhou Tronly New Electronic Materials Co., Ltd.
summary: Changzhou Tronly New Electronic Materials Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, manufacture, and sale of photoresist chemical materials in China and internationally. It offers photointiators, photosensitizers, photo acid generators, and free radical photointiators. The company also provides resins, such as polymers, prepolymers, and monomers. Its products are used in advanced electronic materials, including printed circuit boards, liquid crystal displays, and semiconductors. Changzhou Tronly New Electronic Materials Co., Ltd. was founded in 1997 and is based in Changzhou, China.
